agents.name: Product Agent
agents.description: Translates business needs into Spec-Kit specs.
agents.escalation_rules: If requirement is ambiguous, escalate to Human Product Manager.

agents.name: Architect Agent
agents.description: Designs system components, schemas, and API contracts.
agents.escalation_rules: If schema violates backward compatibility, escalate to Human Architect.

agents.name: Backend Agent
agents.description: Generates, refactors, and optimizes backend code.
agents.escalation_rules: If package install error or compilation error persists > 2 retries, escalate to Tech Lead.

agents.name: QA Agent
agents.description: Creates unit/integration/E2E tests and executes validations.
agents.escalation_rules: If test environment is unavailable, escalate to SRE.

agents.name: Security Agent
agents.description: Scans code and specs for vulnerability, leakages, or policy breach.
agents.escalation_rules: On critical/high vulnerability detection, block CI pipeline and alert Security Lead.
